---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something new
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What you want

One or two sentences.

## Why

What problem does this solve. What does the current behavior do instead.

## What you have already considered

Workarounds, related upstream features, anything in the README under "designed but not yet implemented" that this overlaps with.

## Out of scope check

Q OS is a Switch homebrew launcher fork. It runs on Atmosphere CFW. NRO framebuffer capture is architecturally closed under the current Atmosphere display stack. If your request needs something from that list, it is out of scope and will be closed with a pointer to the constraint.
